title: Regional Banks Embrace FinTech: Nanto Bank Selects Infcurion’s "Winvoice" Ahead of 2027 Promissory Note Phase-Out
tags: The Infcurion IPOInfcurion debuted on the TSE’s Growth Segment on Friday, October 24, 2025. After bookbuilding resulted in a ¥1,680 reference price, above the indicated range up to ¥1,600, the stock’s first quote was ¥1,560, and the closing price ¥1,451, altogether an underwhelming debut. At theJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
